carry_verdict.headline_en: PROXY MARGINAL — small loss of 0.31% per year
carry_verdict.headline_zh: 代理口径边缘亏损 — 对冲后亏 0.31%/年
chain: 借入 CNY · CNH HIBOR 1 年
美元腿收益（美债 2 年替代）
carry_verdict.reasoning_en: Proxy verdict: the US 1Y yield is unavailable in this build, so US 2Y is substituted for the USD leg. Result sits inside the typical bid-offer / financing-spread band. Execution slippage will likely consume any apparent edge — treat as no-go for retail-sized positions.
carry_verdict.reasoning_zh: 代理口径：本次构建缺少美债 1 年收益率，因此美元腿使用美债 2 年替代。结果落在常见的买卖价差与融资点差带内。下单滑点很可能吃掉这点收益 ——零售规模下视同不可做。

policy_stance.reading_en: Multiple defence levers are active simultaneously — the fix is biased stronger than the DXY-adjusted expectation, and either a CNH funding squeeze or an offshore-onshore basis shift confirms direct intervention. PBOC is spending policy capital to hold the line.
policy_stance.reading_zh: 多条防御工具同时启动 —— 中间价相对 DXY 调整后预期定得更强，叠加 CNH 流动性挤压或在岸离岸价差扩大确认直接干预。央行正在消耗政策资本守线。
